'''Galduran Calrissian''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual living before the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Sometime prior to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3956 BBY]], he gained infamy by operating a [[Galduran Calrissian's smuggling ring|smuggling ring]] from within [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. Calrissian's [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ring was not sanctioned by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], however, and he was eventually cornered. He was subsequently forced to sell many of his possessions, including his [[Calrissian's utility belt|personal utility belt]], to avoid being [[Death/Legends|killed]].

==Biography==
Galduran Calrissian was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who operated a [[Galduran Calrissian's smuggling ring|smuggling ring]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] before the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. However, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]],<ref name="kotor" /> the [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Gastropod/Legends|gastropods]] who were in control of Hutt [[Realspace/Legends|Space]],<ref name="NEGAS">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref> had never sanctioned Calrissian's smuggling ring, and his name became a hindrance due to the infamy of his organization. He was eventually driven into a situation in which he had to sell many of his personal items to keep from [[Death/Legends|becoming the last]] of the Calrissian line.<ref name="kotor" />

==Equipment==
Sometime before the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Civil War, Calrissian owned a [[Calrissian's utility belt|utility belt]] that could be worn around a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid's]] waist. When he was forced to sell off a great deal of his possessions, including many of his personal effects, his [[Utility belt/Legends|utility belt]] was one of items that he sold.<ref name="kotor" /> By [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="KotORDate">The ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' to [[3956 BBY]].</ref> his belt was owned by a [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] named [[Crattis Yurkal]], who was selling the belt for 3000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] at [[Aratech Mercantile]], a shop that he maintained at the [[Jedi Enclave]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].<ref name="kotor" />

==Behind the scenes==
Galduran Calrissian was first mentioned in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', a [[2003]] [[BioWare]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]]. He was only mentioned in the game through the description of his belt, which was a one-of-a-kind item that the player could buy on Dantooine from Crattis Yurkal.<ref name="kotor" /> An entry on Calrissian's belt that was included in [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] by [[Prima Games]] had his first name spelled "Garduran." His name was also spelled this way in the appendix of the book.<ref name="kotorsg">[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> This article was written with the assumption that the spelling in the game was correct. Galduran Calrissian shared his last name with<ref name="kotor" /> [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], a character first created for the film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="SWTESB">{{Film|V}}</ref> However, no official link was made between the two characters.
